CustomField.description: The Date that the device was delivered to the Patient. Used in Mogli Templates as a Merge field. https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515688158
CustomField.formula: CASE( MONTH( DATEVALUE( Date_Received_by_Patient__c ) ), 1, "January", 2, "February", 3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6, "June", 7, "July", 8, "August", 9, "September", 10, "October", 11, "November", 12, "December", "Unknown" ) & " " & TEXT( DAY( DATEVALUE( Date_Received_by_Patient__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Date that the device was delivered to the Patient. Used in Mogli Templates as a Merge field. https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515688158
CustomField.label: Arrival Date
